name: emacs-verilog-mode
description: This extension acts as wrapper on top of emacs verilog mode

emacsVerilogMode.autoArgFormat.description: Formatting for AUTOARG signals. 'packed' = multiple per line, 'single' = one per line.

emacsVerilogMode.autoArgSort.description: Non-nil means AUTOARG signals are sorted alphabetically.

emacsVerilogMode.autoDeclareNettype.description: Data type for auto-input etc. Set to 'wire' if using `default_nettype none.

emacsVerilogMode.autoDeleteTrailingWhite.description: Non-nil means delete trailing whitespace during verilog-auto.

emacsVerilogMode.autoEndcomments.description: Non-nil means insert comments after end statements.

emacsVerilogMode.autoIgnoreConcat.description: Non-nil means ignore signals in {...} concatenations for AUTOWIRE etc.

emacsVerilogMode.autoIndentOnNewline.description: Non-nil means automatically indent after newline.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstColumn.description: Column number for net name part of AUTOINST-created pins.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstDotName.description: Non-nil means use .name syntax (SystemVerilog) in AUTOINST.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstInterfacedPorts.description: Non-nil means include interfaced ports in AUTOINST.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstParamValue.description: Non-nil means replace parameters with actual values in AUTOINST.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstParamValueType.description: Non-nil means expand parameter types in instantiations.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstSort.description: Non-nil means AUTOINST signals are sorted.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstTemplateNumbers.description: Add template comments to AUTOINST ports. 'lhs' or true for line numbers.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstTemplateRequire.description: Non-nil means only templated ports are included in AUTOINST.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInstVector.description: Use bus subscripts in AUTOINST. true, 'unsigned', or nil.

emacsVerilogMode.autoLineup.description: Type of statements to line up. 'all', 'declarations', or 'assignments'.

emacsVerilogMode.autoNewline.description: Non-nil means automatically insert newline after semicolons.

emacsVerilogMode.autoReadIncludes.description: Non-nil means automatically read includes before AUTOs.

emacsVerilogMode.autoResetBlockingInNon.description: Non-nil means AUTORESET also resets blocking assignments in non-blocking blocks.

emacsVerilogMode.autoResetWidths.description: Width style for AUTORESET. true = sized, 'unbased' = '0, nil = 0.

emacsVerilogMode.autoSenseDefinesConstan.description: Non-nil means AUTOSENSE assumes all defines are constants.

emacsVerilogMode.autoSenseIncludeInputs.description: Non-nil means AUTOSENSE includes all inputs.

emacsVerilogMode.autoSimplifyExpressions.description: Non-nil means AUTOs simplify bit range expressions.

emacsVerilogMode.autoStarExpand.description: Non-nil means expand SystemVerilog .* ports like AUTOINST.

emacsVerilogMode.autoStarSave.description: Non-nil means save expanded .* connections to disk.

emacsVerilogMode.autoTemplateWarnUnused.description: Non-nil means warn if an AUTO_TEMPLATE line is unused.

emacsVerilogMode.autoTieoffDeclaration.description: Data type for AUTOTIEOFF declarations ('wire', 'assign', etc).

emacsVerilogMode.autoWireComment.description: Non-nil means insert To/From comments with AUTOWIRE.

emacsVerilogMode.autoWireType.description: Data type for AUTOWIRE. Set to 'logic' for SystemVerilog.

emacsVerilogMode.activeLowRegexp.description: Regexp for active-low signals (tied to 1 in AUTORESET/AUTOTIEOFF).

emacsVerilogMode.autoInoutIgnoreRegexp.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOINOUT.

emacsVerilogMode.autoInputIgnoreRegexp.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOINPUT.

emacsVerilogMode.autoOutputIgnoreRegexp.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOOUTPUT.

emacsVerilogMode.autoTieoffIgnoreRegexp.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOTIEOFF.

emacsVerilogMode.autoUnusedIgnoreRegexp.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOUNUSED.

emacsVerilogMode.autoRegInputAssignedIgn.description: Signals matching this regexp are excluded from AUTOREGINPUT.

emacsVerilogMode.typedefRegexp.description: Regexp matching typedef names (e.g. '_t$'). Disabled by default.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLevel.description: Indentation of statements relative to containing block.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLevelBehavioral.description: Absolute indentation of first begin in a task/function.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLevelDeclaration.description: Indentation of declarations relative to containing block.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLevelDirective.description: Indentation added per ifdef nesting level.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLevelModule.description: Indentation of module-level statements (always, initial, etc).

emacsVerilogMode.indentBeginAfterIf.description: Non-nil means indent begin after if/else/while.

emacsVerilogMode.indentClassInsidePkg.description: Non-nil means indent classes inside packages.

emacsVerilogMode.indentDeclarationMacros.description: Non-nil means treat macro expansions as part of declarations for alignment.

emacsVerilogMode.indentIgnoreMultilineDe.description: Non-nil means ignore indentation on multiline define continuations.

emacsVerilogMode.indentIgnoreRegexp.description: Regexp matching lines to ignore for indentation.

emacsVerilogMode.indentLists.description: Non-nil means indent items in sensitivity lists etc.

emacsVerilogMode.cexpIndent.description: Indentation of statements split across lines.

emacsVerilogMode.tabAlwaysIndent.description: Non-nil means TAB always re-indents the current line.

emacsVerilogMode.tabToComment.description: Non-nil means TAB moves to the right-hand column for a comment.

emacsVerilogMode.alignAssignExpr.description: Non-nil means align expressions of continuous assignments.

emacsVerilogMode.alignCommentDistance.description: Distance (spaces) between longest declaration and comments.

emacsVerilogMode.alignDeclExprComments.description: Non-nil means align declaration and expression comments.

emacsVerilogMode.alignIfelse.description: Non-nil means align else under matching if.

emacsVerilogMode.alignTypedefRegexp.description: Regexp matching user typedefs for declaration alignment.

emacsVerilogMode.assignmentDelay.description: Text used for delays in delayed assignments.

emacsVerilogMode.highlightGroupingKeywor.description: Non-nil means highlight begin/end more dramatically.

emacsVerilogMode.highlightIncludes.description: Non-nil means highlight include file names.

emacsVerilogMode.libraryDirectories.description: Elisp list of directories for AUTOINST, e.g. '("." "subdir")'.

emacsVerilogMode.libraryExtensions.description: Elisp list of extensions for module lookup, e.g. '(".v" ".sv")'.

emacsVerilogMode.libraryFiles.description: Elisp list of file paths for module lookup.

emacsVerilogMode.libraryFlags.description: Elisp list of Verilog-XL-style flags, e.g. '("-y dir")'.

emacsVerilogMode.compiler.description: Program and arguments to compile Verilog source.

emacsVerilogMode.coverage.description: Program and arguments for coverage annotation.

emacsVerilogMode.linter.description: Program and arguments to run a lint checker.

emacsVerilogMode.preprocessor.description: Program and arguments to preprocess Verilog source.

emacsVerilogMode.simulator.description: Program and arguments to interpret Verilog source.

emacsVerilogMode.caseFold.description: Non-nil means regexps ignore case. nil is recommended.

emacsVerilogMode.minimumCommentDistance.description: Minimum lines between begin and end before a comment is added.

emacsVerilogMode.warnFatal.description: Non-nil means warnings are fatal errors.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
